title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, August 06 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 07/08/2024
Image reference: 2024-08-07_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-06-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: S&P Values see downward correction for mid-age Capesizes owing to sales of vessels such as Cape Mathilde
Capesize BC Cape Mathilde (178,400 DWT, Nov 2010, Mitsui Ichihara) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 30 mil VV Value USD 31.90 mil
Supramax BC Dolce Vita (61,600 DWT, Sep 2012, Oshima) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 23.5 mil VV Value USD 22.90 mil
Handy BC Life Passion (37,300 DWT, Jan 2018, Dongzhe) sold to unknown German buyers for USD 22 mil VV Value USD 21.60 mil
Tankers: Older tonnage Suezmax and Aframax values softening last week tracking a decrease in earnings
MR2 (Chemical/Product) Sugar (42,200 DWT, Jul 2002, Hyundai Mipo) sold to Deep Frontline Shippers for USD 14.5 mil, VV Value USD 14.97 mil
Containers: Values edged up again last week for modern, mid-age, and older assets
No notable sales last week
Image reference: 2024-08-07_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-06-2024_img2.jpg
